MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Ed Kaegi, is present. Represented by Ed Kaegi
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Leonard Rosen, Carl Tinalle, and Pierre Barral, are present.
Attorney, Eric Meckley, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-29-2010 is vacated.
